items.title: ‘She is planning to move out of state’: My sister sold our elderly mother’s house from under her. What can I do?
items.description: “She claims that she needs to have those funds available for when our mother eventually requires nursing-home care.”

items.title: Coal stocks gain as Trump looks set to issue executive order calling for industry deals with military
items.description: Coal stocks advanced Wednesday following news that President Donald Trump plans to sign an executive order that could help the industry.

items.title: A budget airline cancelled my flight and gave me a $25 voucher and a hotel room. Is this normal?
items.description: “After cancelling, they put me on a different flight that had no TVs.”
